prompt: A favicon icon, 1024x1024. A 3x3 grid of small rounded squares on a pure black background (#08080c). Eight squares are dark gray (#2a2a3a) and one square (the center or top-right one) is highlighted in bright green (#9ece6a). The grid represents an image gallery/grid view. Clean geometric layout, even spacing, no gradients, no shading. Minimal and abstract. Must be recognizable at 16x16 pixels. No text, no labels.
